reachability_artifacts: built sworn doctor run from cmd/sworn/doctor_records_v015_test.go:TestDoctorV015RecordCarriersBinaryReachability proves the real state/board/spec carrier and renderer path without mutation

effort_complexity.rationale: Known v0.15 record shapes threaded through ten carrier surfaces.

release_benefit: Prevents later protocol authorities from acting on silently truncated planning and lifecycle records.

design_decisions.choice: Separate canonical scope, lifecycle ledger, and integration authorities while keeping state, board, and spec packages lossless carriers.
options: focused domain authorities with lossless carriers
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified by Brad (Coach), 2026-07-15: use focused scope, ledger, and integration authorities with lossless state, board, and spec carriers.
design_decisions.rationale: The one-way package boundary prevents record carriers and public adapters from becoming competing protocol authorities.

positive_scenarios: All v0.15 carrier fields survive read, write, render, and MCP exchange.
negative_scenarios: Invalid records fail before replacement and carriers never invent lifecycle evidence.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: Lossless carriers make every later validator operate on the protocol record the Planner actually authored.
